debug_info.goal:
μ : ℝ
v p : NNReal
t : ℝ
S : Set ℝ := Icc (μ - 2 * √↑v) (μ + 2 * √↑v)
⊢ ∀ x ∈ S, |Real.exp (t * x)| ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √↑v))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simp [hx']
              _ ≤ |μ| + |x - μ| := by simpa using (abs_add μ (x - μ))
          have hx2 : |μ| + |x - μ| ≤ |μ| + 2 * √(↑v : ℝ) := add_le_add_left habs |μ|
          exact le_trans hx1 hx2
        have htx : t * x ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √(↑v : ℝ)) := by
          calc
            t * x ≤ |t * x| := le_abs_self (t * x)
            _ = |t| * |x| := by simpa [abs_mul]
            _ ≤ |t| * (|μ| + 2 * √(↑v : ℝ)) := by
              exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hxabs (abs_nonneg t)
        have hexp : Real.exp (t * x) ≤ Real.exp (|t| * (|μ| + 2 * √(↑v : ℝ))) := by
          exact (Real.exp_le_exp).2 htx
        simpa [Real.abs_exp, NNReal.coe_sqrt] using hexp
